criteria.name: Identification of Core Syntactic Structures
criteria.description: Ability to identify and define the main syntactic structures relevant to the problem.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Clearly identifies relevant syntactic structures such as noun phrases, verb phrases, and clauses.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to identify or incorrectly labels basic syntactic structures.

criteria.name: Clarification of Ambiguities
criteria.description: Ability to recognize and clarify syntactic ambiguities in the problem statement.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Identifies potential ambiguities and provides clear distinctions between possible interpretations.
criteria.poor_indicator: Overlooks ambiguities or provides vague clarifications.

criteria.name: Specification of Parsing Goals
criteria.description: Ability to translate the problem into specific parsing tasks and objectives.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Clearly defines the parsing goals with a focus on extracting syntactic relationships.
criteria.poor_indicator: Provides unclear or overly broad parsing goals without focus.

typical_errors: Confusing syntactic categories with semantic roles.

criteria.name: Error Detection in Parse Trees
criteria.description: Ability to identify incorrect or incomplete elements in AI-generated parse trees.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Accurately identifies errors in node labels, branching, or missing elements.
criteria.poor_indicator: Misses obvious errors or incorrectly reports correct structures as erroneous.

criteria.name: Evaluation of Structural Consistency
criteria.description: Ability to assess the consistency of syntactic structures with linguistic theory.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Consistently evaluates parse trees against established syntactic rules and theories.
criteria.poor_indicator: Ignores or misapplies syntactic rules, leading to inconsistent evaluations.

criteria.name: Identification of Parsing Gaps
criteria.description: Ability to recognize areas where the AI's parsing is incomplete or lacks depth.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Identifies specific omissions or areas lacking detail in the parse.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to recognize incomplete parsing or provides vague comments.

typical_errors: Confusing syntactic errors with semantic errors.
Failing to recognize missing modifiers or adjuncts.

criteria.name: Precision in Correction Commands
criteria.description: Ability to provide clear and precise instructions to correct AI parsing errors.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Provides detailed and specific commands that directly address identified errors.
criteria.poor_indicator: Gives vague or overly general instructions that do not clearly guide AI corrections.

criteria.name: Adaptation to AI Feedback
criteria.description: Ability to adapt and refine correction commands based on AI's responses.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Effectively adjusts commands in response to AI feedback, showing iterative improvement.
criteria.poor_indicator: Repeats ineffective commands without adjustment or fails to respond to AI feedback.

criteria.name: Use of Linguistic Terminology
criteria.description: Effectiveness in using appropriate linguistic terminology in steering commands.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Consistently uses accurate and relevant linguistic terms in commands.
criteria.poor_indicator: Misuses or avoids linguistic terminology, leading to unclear instructions.

typical_errors: Issuing commands without specifying the affected syntactic elements.
Failing to update commands when previous attempts do not yield improvements.
Using informal language instead of precise linguistic terms.
